testimonials.text: I've never felt so genuinely welcomed at a salon. Sahis has created something truly special in Lexington. Every visit is like a reset for my entire week.
testimonials.author: — A. Patel

testimonials.text: The facial I got was the best I've ever had — they actually took the time to understand my skin. The ambiance is calm and beautiful. I won't go anywhere else.
testimonials.author: — M. Thornton

testimonials.text: Booked a spa package for my birthday and it was perfect from start to finish. The team is professional, warm, and incredibly skilled. Highly recommend.
testimonials.author: — L. Nguyen
